title: Bubonic
description: The 'black death' was the deadliest pandemic in recorded history, and now in your Minecraft world.
body:
![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3DptXU3rP9%26curseforge%3D1100747&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362)

The 'black death' was the deadliest pandemic in recorded history, and now in your Minecraft world. This is a very simple and straightforward mod, stay away from the plague to survive. Infected mobs will have black skull particles around them and approaching just a few blocks away is enough for you to catch it.

During world generation, there is a rare chance for an animal mob to spawn with the plague. At night, zombies have a much higher chance of spawning with the infection and spread it to nearby mobs. For everyday you have the plague, it will only worsen with day 1 being "harmless". By day 2, it will start to kill you making it almost impossible to survive days 3 to 4. On day 5, you will die. Your only hope is eating an enchanted golden apple which will instantly cure you. Milk will not save you.

Can you survive the plague on a hardcore world?
